name: raksara
description: A GitHub-native static content platform that builds a navigable metadata tree from repository files and renders blogs, portfolios, and pages with search, tags, and pagination.

scripts.build:metadata: node scripts/build-metadata.js && node scripts/build-agentic.js && node scripts/build-sitelinks.js && node scripts/validate-advertising-config.js
scripts.build:metadata:strict: node scripts/build-metadata.js --strict && node scripts/build-agentic.js --strict && node scripts/build-sitelinks.js && node scripts/validate-advertising-config.js
scripts.validate:seo:dist: node scripts/validate-seo-dist.js && node scripts/validate-agentic-dist.js && node scripts/validate-sitelinks-dist.js
scripts.dev: npm run build:metadata && cd sveltekit && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:metadata && npm run validate:seo:build && npm run build:sveltekit && npm run validate:seo:dist

author: Yunaz Ramadhan
